message:
feat: group bd doctor warnings/errors by category for better readability (bd-4qfb)

Instead of a flat numbered list, warnings and errors are now grouped
under their category headers (Core System, Git Integration, etc.)
with per-category pass counts. This makes the output much easier to
scan and process.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
